title: Falling Apples
body:
[![Requires Fabric API](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Frequires%2Ffabric-api_64h.png&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)



This mod makes apples occasionally fall from oak and dark oak leaves, making it easier to gather food.

Features:

Apples fall from trees naturally.
